title: Poka-Yoke ROI Calculator
description: Calculates the return on investment for implementing a poka-yoke (mistake-proofing) device or process, based on defect reduction, quality cost savings, and implementation expenses.

inputs.label: Annual Units Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced per year for the process line where the poka-yoke will be applied.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced per year for the process line where the poka-yoke will be applied.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Poka-yoke uygulanacak proses hattında yılda üretilen toplam birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der pro Jahr produzierten Einheiten für die Prozesslinie, in der das Poka-Yoke angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités produites par an pour la ligne de processus où le poka-yoke sera appliqué.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de unidades producidas por año en la línea de proceso donde se aplicará el poka-yoke.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد الوحدات المنتجة سنويًا لخط العملية حيث سيتم تطبيق البوكا-يوك.

inputs.label: Current Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Current defect rate in parts per million (ppm) for the process step targeted by the poka-yoke.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current defect rate in parts per million (ppm) for the process step targeted by the poka-yoke.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Poka-yoke hedeflenen proses adımı için milyonda parça (ppm) cinsinden mevcut hata oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle Fehlerrate in Teilen pro Million (ppm) für den Prozessschritt, der durch das Poka-Yoke adressiert wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de défauts actuel en parties par million (ppm) pour l'étape de processus ciblée par le poka-yoke.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de defectos actual en partes por millón (ppm) para el paso del proceso objetivo del poka-yoke.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل العيوب الحالي بالأجزاء لكل مليون (ppm) لخطوة العملية المستهدفة بواسطة البوكا-يوك.

inputs.label: Defect Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average total cost incurred per defective unit, including scrap, rework, warranty, and lost customer goodwill.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average total cost incurred per defective unit, including scrap, rework, warranty, and lost customer goodwill.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hatalı birim başına ortalama toplam maliyet (fire, yeniden işleme, garanti ve kaybedilen müşteri itibarı dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Gesamtkosten pro fehlerhafter Einheit, einschließlich Ausschuss, Nacharbeit, Garantie und entgangener Kundenzufriedenheit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total moyen par unité défectueuse, incluant rebut, reprise, garantie et perte de clientèle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total promedio incurrido por unidad defectuosa, incluyendo desperdicio, retrabajo, garantía y pérdida de buena voluntad del cliente.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط التكلفة الإجمالية لكل وحدة معيبة، بما في ذلك الهدر وإعادة العمل والضمان وفقدان حسن نية العميل.

inputs.label: Poka-Yoke Effectiveness
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage of defects that will be prevented by the poka-yoke device or process.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage of defects that will be prevented by the poka-yoke device or process.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Poka-yoke cihazı veya prosesi tarafından önlenmesi beklenen hataların yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Prozentsatz der Fehler, die durch die Poka-Yoke-Vorrichtung oder den Prozess verhindert werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage attendu de défauts qui seront évités par le dispositif ou processus poka-yoke.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje esperado de defectos que serán prevenidos por el dispositivo o proceso poka-yoke.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية المتوقعة للعيوب التي سيمنعها جهاز أو عملية البوكا-يوك.

inputs.label: Implementation Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total one-time cost to design, purchase, install, and validate the poka-yoke solution.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total one-time cost to design, purchase, install, and validate the poka-yoke solution.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Poka-yoke çözümünü tasarlamak, satın almak, kurmak ve doğrulamak için toplam tek seferlik maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Einmalige Gesamtkosten für Design, Kauf, Installation und Validierung der Poka-Yoke-Lösung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût unique total pour concevoir, acheter, installer et valider la solution poka-yoke.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo único total para diseñar, comprar, instalar y validar la solución poka-yoke.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة الإجمالية لمرة واحدة لتصميم وشراء وتركيب والتحقق من حل البوكا-يوك.

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost
inputs.businessContext: Recurring yearly cost for calibration, spare parts, and upkeep of the poka-yoke system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Recurring yearly cost for calibration, spare parts, and upkeep of the poka-yoke system.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Poka-yoke sisteminin kalibrasyonu, yedek parçaları ve bakımı için yıllık tekrarlanan maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlich wiederkehrende Kosten für Kalibrierung, Ersatzteile und Wartung des Poka-Yoke-Systems.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût annuel récurrent pour l'étalonnage, les pièces de rechange et l'entretien du système poka-yoke.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo anual recurrente para calibración, piezas de repuesto y mantenimiento del sistema poka-yoke.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة السنوية المتكررة للمعايرة وقطع الغيار والصيانة لنظام البوكا-يوك.

inputs.label: Labor Hours Saved per Year
inputs.businessContext: Estimated reduction in inspection and rework labor hours per year due to the poka-yoke.

label_i18n.fr: Heures de main-d'œuvre économisées par an
label_i18n.es: Horas de mano de obra ahorradas por año

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated reduction in inspection and rework labor hours per year due to the poka-yoke.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Poka-yoke sayesinde yılda tahmini olarak azaltılan muayene ve yeniden işleme işçilik saatleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte Reduzierung der Arbeitsstunden für Inspektion und Nacharbeit pro Jahr durch das Poka-Yoke.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Réduction estimée des heures de main-d'œuvre d'inspection et de reprise par an grâce au poka-yoke.
businessContext_i18n.es: Reducción estimada en horas de mano de obra de inspección y retrabajo por año debido al poka-yoke.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التخفيض المقدر في ساعات عمل الفحص وإعادة العمل سنويًا بفضل البوكا-يوك.

inputs.label: Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened hourly labor cost for operators and inspectors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully burdened hourly labor cost for operators and inspectors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Operatörler ve denetçiler için tam yüklü saatlik işçilik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Voll belastete stündliche Arbeitskosten für Bediener und Prüfer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût horaire de main-d'œuvre entièrement chargé pour les opérateurs et les inspecteurs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste laboral por hora totalmente cargado para operadores e inspectores.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة العمالة بالساعة شاملة التكاليف الإضافية للمشغلين والمفتشين.

rules.message: Defect rate must be between 10 and 100,000 ppm.
Poka-yoke effectiveness must be between 80% and 99%.
Implementation cost must be greater than zero.
Project life must be at least 1 year.

thresholds.message: The calculated ROI is negative. Consider re-evaluating the implementation cost or expected defect reduction.
Exceptional ROI! The poka-yoke investment is highly justified.
Current defect rate is very high (>10,000 ppm). Immediate action recommended.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
